title: Former Iraq PM Maliki vows to pursue return to office despite US opposition
description:
Former Iraqi Prime Minister Nouri al Maliki has vowed to continue pursuing a return to office regardless of US pressure opposing his candidacy, intensifying political uncertainty following Iraq’s November 2025 elections. Maliki’s bid comes as Shiite factions within the Coordination Framework weigh their options amid ongoing efforts to select a new president and prime minister.

title: US State Department orders non-emergency personnel to depart from Beirut embassy
description:
The US State Department ordered the departure of all non-emergency government personnel from the US Embassy in Beirut, along with their family members. Many media outlets tied this to rising US regional tensions with Iran. A Lebanese media outlet suggested it was in response to threats to the embassy from Hezbollah.
The post US State Department orders non-emergency personnel to depart from Beirut embassy appeared first on FDDs Long War Journal.

title: Millions in Somalia at risk of severe hunger from drought, says UN

title: Trump’s 2026 State of Union address shows US politics ‘as divided as ever’
description: President Donald Trump made “very little effort to reach across the aisle to Democrats” in his 2026 State of the Union speech, the longest in US history. He zeroed in on his “red meat issue, which is immigration,” sparking heckles at times from some Democrats, David Smith, The Guardian’s Washington DC bureau chief, tells FRANCE 24 shortly after the address.

title: Trump threatens Iran in State of the Union speech, Tehran compares him to Goebbels
description: President Donald Trump claimed during his 2026 State of the Union speech that Iran was developing missiles that can strike the US.  An Iranian foreign ministry spokesman on Wednesday dismissed the claim, comparing it to Nazi propagandist Joseph Goebbels’s “illusion of truth” quote: "Repeat a lie often enough and it becomes the truth”. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

He also warned that Tehran has developed missiles that can threaten Europe and is working on missiles “that will soon reach” the US and is trying to rebuild its nuclear program.

title: Russian MOD Shows U.S. F-35, F-16 Intercepting Tu-95MS And Su-35S Off Alaska
description: The intercept was carried out as the Russian Tu-95MS bombers and their escorting fighters transited the Alaskan ADIZ (Air Defense Identification Zone). On Feb. 19, 2026, the U.S. Air Force launched two F-16s, two F-35s, one E-3, and four KC-135s tankers to intercept, positively identify, and escort the aircraft until they departed the Alaskan ADIZ.
